public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as law speaker.
appearance: Dema Ashmason carries the marks of law speaker in industrial grit: practical wear, maintained details, and a look that suggests they expect to be read before they are trusted.
manner: In conversation, Dema Ashmason is quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock; they listen for leverage, social risk, and the sentence beneath the sentence.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of law speaker in and around Soreheim Alliance, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Protect their footing in Soreheim Proper while steering current strain away from a public rupture they may not survive politically or materially.
hidden_pressure: A private obligation, debt, promise, or fear tied to work shortfalls is narrowing their options faster than they admit.

adventure_hooks.summary: Dema Ashmason needs discreet outside help to contain political strain, prestige loss, or institutional damage before it spreads through Soreheim Alliance.
Getting entangled with Dema Ashmason can pull the party into protocol, alliance pressure, or public consequence centered on Soreheim Alliance.
Dema Ashmason can trade usable insight about Soreheim Alliance if the party solves a problem that cannot be addressed openly through the office they hold.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Dress quality, attention from others, and practiced command of protocol signal that Dema Ashmason carries civic or noble weight.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Soreheim Alliance: estates, audience spaces, council rooms, protocol-heavy gatherings, or civic seats

first_impression: Dema Ashmason presents as Treats etiquette, timing, and public meaning as inseparable parts of authority. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a law speaker still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Law Speaker, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Soreheim Alliance.
what_they_refuse: Dema Ashmason refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Law Speaker too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Dema Ashmason can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Dema Ashmason adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Dema Ashmason is Known locally through day-to-day work as law speaker. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Law Speaker.
social_texture: Dema Ashmason speaks like someone who has spent too long translating private stakes into acceptable public language. Around Soreheim Proper, people read them as quota-aware, contribution-minded, and never fully off the clock.
money_pressure: Their material pressure is tied to production; even when wealthy, they think in terms of loss, leverage, and what one bad week would expose.
status_anxiety: What they fear most is not simple failure but work shortfalls becoming socially visible before they can contain it.
long_memory: They remember who made their work harder, who preserved dignity under strain, and who tried to force speed without bearing consequence.
obvious_tell: When pressure rises, Dema touches clothing, tools, or insignia before answering, as if checking that their role is still intact.
best_use_case: Use Dema Ashmason when the party needs a socially grounded face for Soreheim Proper: access, warning, delay, price, or reluctant help.
private_contradiction: They want to appear consistent, but their real choices are split between duty, self-protection, and preserving one relationship they cannot afford to lose.
